title: RRB Appointment and promotion of Officers and Employees Amendment Rules, 2011
description: RRB Appointment and promotion of Officers and Employees Amendment Rules, 2011
file_title: RRB Appointment and promotion of Officers and Employees Amendment Rules, 2011.pdf
text: [To be published in Part II Section 3(ii) of the Gazette of India –Extraordinary] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Financial Services) New Delhi, dated the 12 December, 2011 NOTIFICATION S.O (E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by section 29 read with section 17 of the Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976 (21 of 1976) the Central Government, after consultation with the National Bank and the Sponsor Banks specified in the Second Schedule to these rules, hereby makes the following amendment in the Regional Rural Banks (Appointment and Promotion of Officers and Employees) Rules, 2010, namely:- 1. (1) These Rules may be called the Regional Rural Banks (Appointment and Promotion of Officers and Employees) Amendment Rules, 2011. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Regional Rural Banks (Appointment and Promotion of Officers and Employees) Rules, 2010, in the third schedule, in part I –Group “A” in the Table.-, (a) against Sr. No. III relating to the Officer Middle Management (Scale III) in clause (c), in sub-clause (B), under the heading For promotion, in item (iv), under the heading Preparation of Merit List, in the sub-heading Normal channel for the words and figures “there shall be minimum qualifying marks of 50% in aggregate of written test, interview and performance appraisal reports”, the words and figures “There shall be minimum qualifying marks of 50% in aggregate of interview and performance appraisal reports” shall be substituted; (b) against serial numbers I, II, III and IV relating to the Officers Junior Management (Scale I), Officer Middle Management(Scale II), Officer Middle Management (Scale III), Officer Senior Management(Scale IV), in clause(e) under the heading” composition of the Committee for interview, for the entries, the following entries shall be respectively substituted, namely:- “The Committee shall consist of the following, namely:- 1) The Chairman of the Regional Rural Bank concerned - Chairman (2) An officer nominated by Sponsor Bank not below the rank of Assistant General Manager - Member (3) An officer nominated by National Bank not below the rank of Assistant General Manager - Member Note: If none of the members of the Committee belongs to the Scheduled Castes or the Scheduled Tribes, the Board may nominate an officer of suitable position -- 1 of 2 -- belonging to the Scheduled Castes or the Scheduled Tribes as an additional member of the Committee. [F.NO. 7/5/2009–RRB (Part] (Umesh Kumar) Joint Secretary to the Government of India Note: The principal notification was published vide number S.O.1663 (E) dated the 13.7.2010 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3 sub-section (ii). To, The Manager, Government of India Press, Mayapuri Industrial Area, Ring Road, Delhi. -- 2 of 2 --
